name: Myer Holdings Limited
analysis: MYR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2900, stop A$0.2277, target A$0.3224 (0.52:1) — then trail it.
